summary: The Optimism receipt file codec divergence is a semicolon-only rustfmt change in the empty-buffer decode return; no codec behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 210: M	crates/optimism/cli/src/receipt_file_codec.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Ok(None)` to `return Ok(None);` when the decode source buffer is empty.
No receipt decoding, buffering, or error handling behavior changed.
